steps.title: Spot the signal about what the evidence proves
steps.content: The phrase “Whether Merneith was a pharaoh or not, this discovery supports the idea that...” signals the tablet evidence establishes a specific fact: Merneith was “in charge of the country's treasury and other central offices.”

steps.title: Identify which conclusion the evidence supports
steps.content: Choice C—“had an important role in Egypt's government”—directly captures the governmental authority these positions demonstrate. The other choices either address unmentioned chronological issues (A), claim unestablished writing innovation (B), or describe unmentioned international travel (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
